title: AIOS Constitutional Node Runtime v1
purpose: Smallest sovereign unit of constitutional administrative intelligence.

runtimePlanes.name: Identity Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Manage constitutional identities, authority, delegation, and consent.

runtimePlanes.name: Evidence Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Ingest, validate, store, and expose evidence artifacts.

runtimePlanes.name: Truth Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Compute context-specific truth evaluations from evidence without overriding ledger neutrality.

runtimePlanes.name: Knowledge Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Maintain ontology, knowledge graph, semantic links, and traceability.

runtimePlanes.name: Sovereignty Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Enforce constitutional rules, tiers, authority boundaries, and node-level governance.

runtimePlanes.name: Continuity Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Preserve lineage, invariants, replayability, and constitutional evolution.

runtimePlanes.name: Institutional Memory Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Record decisions, receipts, relationships, and institutional workflows.

runtimePlanes.name: Reality Runtime
runtimePlanes.role: Optional v1 integration of external signals into constitutional context.
